scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "gateway,auth,users,estab,market,booking,notif,review" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan,green,yellow,red,white,gray" "npm run start:dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run start:dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix user-pet-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix establishment-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix marketplace-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix booking-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix review-service"
scripts.setup: node install-all.js && cd auth-service && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts && cd ..
